question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list the main sections of the thesis. Instead, it presents a timeline of activities, which is more of a work plan than a section outline. There is no indication of chapter titles or thematic parts of the thesis such as introduction, literature review, methodology, results, etc.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the content of any section of the thesis. It only lists tasks and deadlines, without explaining what each section would contain or its purpose within the overall structure.

question: Structure
feedback: The text does not convey the general structure of the thesis. It presents a schedule of activities rather than a logical flow of chapters or sections. As such, it is not possible to understand the organization of the thesis from this text alone.
